Build a WordPress module with full security sweeps

Speed is not the win if the output ships with obvious injection, permission, or nonce mistakes.

Where it removes work

  • Faster build in legacy ecosystems
  • Security review built into the agent loop
  • Less dependence on a single platform specialist

What Sysmatic would build

  • Generate the module against platform conventions
  • Run security-specific code review
  • Patch until the risky paths are closed
